apigatewayv2.integration.responseparamet.Docs: Specifies the location of the response to modify, and how to modify it. To learn more, see [Transforming API requests and responses](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/apigateway/latest/developerguide/http-api-parameter-mapping.html).

Specifies the data to update the parameter with. To learn more, see [Transforming API requests and responses](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/apigateway/latest/developerguide/http-api-parameter-mapping.html).
